descriptions.value: Still very young, but already a fighter. This baby bird isn't afraid of anything.
Bird without a name, but with a strong desire to live, and complete its mission.
Too old to fly? Nonsense. It may look weak, but don't be fooled, there's a strong heart in this one.
The only safe point in this crazy, hostile world.
Is he really mad? Or maybe he's trying to help the hero fulfill his duty?
The first ship you'll fly. Well balanced.
This is the second ship. It is extremely light and fast but can't take many hits.
This is the third ship. It is slow and tank like. Can take more hits than others.
The fourth ship is another balanced type but this time with more shields.
This is the fifth ship. It is incredibly fast and comes equipped with a shield in case you hit something

An orphan, she's like a younger sister to Edge. 
She tries to help Edge to move on with life.

A reserved but friendly man. Struggling daily
without his parents.

A mage who was exiled from Edge's hometown
for practicing magic.
A royal guard of the queen of Rosefalcon Kingdom.
A mysterious knight that seems to always pop up at the worst time.
Don't get close!
Get out of the way!
Touching them is a bad idea.
Doesn't blend well with the Blue Guy.
Increases your score!
Don't you recognize yourself?
Not the nicest folk around.
... at last.
All around you.

descriptions.value: Woodie is a wooden craftsman who enjoys breaking things. And he breaks a lot of things!
This little white turnip enjoys everything. Especially crawling bugs and oh yes, they hate it!
A gravedigger who became a ghost on his own graveyard. Many fear ghosts, but what do ghosts fear? Now we know: spiders, what else!?
The potion brewing crow lives in a secluded, magical forest and is utterly annoyed by having to join a group of brave adventurers to save the day.
The three-eyed chicken magician summoned the malicious skull who roams the lands for the worse.
This piece of burning, cracked skull has the ability to transmute everything with the help of a flashy glitch beam. Oh dear!
